name: Hot Cashew Chicken Salad 365
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds Chicken breast, boneless and skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. Prep: 25 minutes
2. Cook: 5 minutes
In a salad bowl, combine lettuce, spinach, and oranges.
3. In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, honey, ginger, and 3 tablespoons water. Set aside.
4. In a wok, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken, stir-fry until cooked, about 5 minutes.
5. Add scallions and garlic, cook for an additional minute.
6. Add the sauce mixture and cook, tossing, for 30 seconds.
7. Pour the chicken and sauce over the greens and oranges, toss to combine.
8. Sprinkle with cashews.
